notes: The game runs fine, but I cannot play online. The anti-cheat system did install, but did not run. Overall the gameplay is a bit slow, but that could be caused by my GT 730 GPU from Nvidia. To get it running I used Lutris and moved a couple dll file around. For some reason Esync was causing the game to look like a powerpoint presentation. TLDR it was ok.

notes: Offline mode and Multi-Lobby work perfectly out of the box. Unsure about multiplayer (has caused the game to freeze when I attempted, but the same goes for my Windows-using friends, even when trying to play without Proton users).
title: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 2

notes: MUST USE PROTON 4.2-9. Proton 4.11 doesn't allow you to walk in lobby. to change proton version right click on the game name and go to properties. select "Force the use of a specific steam play compatibility tool" and choose your proton version (4.2-9))
title: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 2

notes: Mistakes were made. Found out alt + tabbing or switching workspaces causes the controls to become unresponsive outside of the menu and talk button. Using Windowed mode fixes this issue. Ignore what I said about using older versions of Proton.
title: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 2

notes: Only complaint I have is alt-tabbing anywhere but the title screen makes controls in the hub unresponsive (however in battle the controls work fine oddly). Other than that runs like native.
title: DRAGON BALL XENOVERSE 2
